config_template.call: ttnn.linear(x, weight, bias={BIAS}, memory_config={MEM_CONFIG}, dtype={DTYPE}, program_config={PROGRAM_CONFIG}, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y={GRID_Y}, x={GRID_X}), compute_kernel_config={COMPUTE_KERNEL_CONFIG})
config_template.notes: program_config and core_grid are mutually exclusive (core_grid passed only 'if not pc'). For long sequences reshape input to [1, {SEQ}//{MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN}, {MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN}, -1] before the matmul and back to [1, 1, {SEQ}, -1] after; MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN observed as 1024 or 2048.

weight_transform: torch nn.Linear weight [out_features, in_features] must be transposed to [in_features, out_features] (and optionally reshaped to rank-4 [1,1,K,N]) before ttnn.from_torch, since ttnn.linear computes x @ W. Evidence: `state['weight'].transpose_(0, 1)` and `w_torch.transpose(-2, -1).unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)` in call sites; golden does `input_tensor_a @ input_tensor_b`.

placement_observations.source: MoE router call site: `is_decode = actual_tokens <= 128; mem_config = ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG if is_decode else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG`

placement_observations.size_descriptor: router logits, tokens > 128 (prefill regime, large sequences)
placement_observations.source: MoE router call site: L1 for decode (small tensors), DRAM for prefill (large sequences)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-mode QKV projection, M=32 (one tile of users), N=fused qkv dim
placement_observations.source: llama attention decode: xqkv_fused_sharded = ttnn.linear(x, self.wqkv, memory_config=ttnn.L1_WIDTH_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG, program_config=XQKV_DECODE_PROGCFG, compute_kernel_config=hifi2)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-mode projection weights (wqkv/wo/gate/up/down), K x N per device
placement_observations.source: decode paths select *_dram_sharded weight variants with dramshard program configs; prefill paths use interleaved weights

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill QKV/WO/MLP projections, seq_len >= 1024 (input reshaped to chunks of 1024/2048)
placement_observations.source: llama prefill: `if seq_len > 1024: x_11SH = ttnn.reshape(x_11SH, [1, seq_len // 1024, 1024, -1])` then ttnn.linear(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, program_config=...PREFILL_PROGCFG(seq_len))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill sequence longer than max matmul seq
placement_observations.source: vision attention: input reshaped [1, seq_len//MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN, MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN, -1] before linear, output reshaped back after

placement_observations.size_descriptor: ViT/BERT encoder activations, batch<=12, seq~196-384, hidden 768-1024

memory_config.shard_spec_template: ttnn.L1_BLOCK_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG, resharded between 48/64/120/144-core grids between ops

placement_observations.source: lm_head docstring: 'Weight dtype: bfloat8_b, Weight memory: DRAM INTERLEAVED'

placement_observations.size_descriptor: lm_head activations, decode (seq=1..32) vs prefill (long seq)
placement_observations.source: lm_head docstring: 'Decode input/output: L1 INTERLEAVED, Prefill input/output: DRAM INTERLEAVED'

placement_observations.size_descriptor: matmul choice by sequence length: ttnn.linear preferred for short seq
placement_observations.source: mistral MLP/attention: 'For shorter sequence lengths use the original matmul since it performs better than the minimal matmul' — `if seq_len < 4096 or batch_size > 1: ttnn.linear(...)` else minimal_matmul

placement_observations.size_descriptor: transformer block in-projection with C in {768, 1280, 1536} channels (shard grid mismatch)
placement_observations.source: SD transformer: 'For 1280 channels shard layout will be over 64 cores, but MM runs on 40' — hidden_states moved to ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG before linear

placement_observations.size_descriptor: segformer attention key/value at very long seq
placement_observations.source: segformer: `if seq_len == 16384: key = ttnn.to_memory_config(key, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b)` after sharded linear output
